# 3D Printable Models

> A collection of OpenSCAD 3D-printable models with an interactive Three.js web viewer.
> Browse, rotate, and download STLs for vacuum fittings, toothbrush holders, terrain models, and more.

## Site

- [3D Models viewer](https://www.bstjohn.net/3d-models/)
- [Model manifest (JSON)](https://www.bstjohn.net/3d-models/models.json)

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/stjohnb/3d-models)
